label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: KARAPAS Richard took his third stage win on the plateau finish, holding off ESMAN by 8 seconds while EVENEPOEL secured overall victory.
tactical_patterns: Red jersey group refused mutual cooperation on final climb, each rider neutralizing others' attacks despite narrow GC gaps.
STANARD Rob collected KOM points from breakaway despite not contesting stage, threatening KARAPAS's polka dot jersey on final day.
KARAPAS bridged from red jersey group to breakaway on penultimate climb, using stage hunting to defend KOM classification.
Red jersey group closed to 11 seconds behind KARAPAS before coordination collapsed, allowing him solo plateau run-in.

rider_signals.KARAPAS Richard: positive: Transitioned from team principal role to three stage wins and secured KOM, showing versatile race management.
rider_signals.ESMAN Jay: positive: Eight-second deficit despite late solo chase suggests strong time trialing on plateau terrain.
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: Attacks consistently neutralized by EVENEPOEL group, unable to convert climbing strength into GC gains.
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: negative: Spanish champion struggled badly on final mountain stage, dropped to seventh overall from podium contention.
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Controlled all attacks while under pressure from Quick-Step team, maintaining 2:05 margin without offensive moves.
